title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.
title_es: Cloudflare y OpenAI lanzan Agent Cloud para empresas
bajada: Cloudflare integró GPT-5.4 y Codex de OpenAI en su Agent Cloud, permitiendo a empresas construir, desplegar y escalar agentes de IA para tareas del mundo real con seguridad incorporada. Esta colaboración facilita la adopción de agentes IA en entornos empresariales.
bajada_en: Cloudflare integrated OpenAI's GPT-5.4 and Codex into its Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with built-in security. This collaboration streamlines agentic AI adoption in enterprise environments.

title: OpenAI has bought AI personal finance startup Hiro
summary: The acquisition indicates a capability that OpenAI is building into ChatGPT: financial planning.
title_es: OpenAI adquiere Hiro para integrar planificación financiera en ChatGPT
bajada: OpenAI compró la startup de finanzas personales Hiro para añadir capacidades de planificación financiera a ChatGPT. La adquisición marca la expansión de OpenAI hacia servicios financieros integrados en su plataforma principal.
bajada_en: OpenAI acquired personal finance startup Hiro to add financial planning capabilities to ChatGPT. The acquisition marks OpenAI's expansion into integrated financial services on its main platform.

title: GAIA – Open-source framework for building AI agents that run on local hardware
title_es: GAIA: Framework open-source para agentes IA en hardware local
bajada: AMD lanzó GAIA, un framework de código abierto que permite construir y ejecutar agentes IA directamente en hardware local sin dependencias en la nube. La herramienta ganó tracción en comunidades de developers interesadas en agentes IA descentralizados.
bajada_en: AMD launched GAIA, an open-source framework for building and running AI agents directly on local hardware without cloud dependencies. The tool gained traction among developers interested in decentralized agentic AI systems.

title: Microsoft is working on yet another OpenClaw-like agent
summary: The new features would be geared toward enterprise customers, with better security controls than the famously risky open source OpenClaw agent.
title_es: Microsoft desarrolla agente tipo OpenClaw con controles empresariales
bajada: Microsoft está creando su propio agente IA similar a OpenClaw pero con controles de seguridad mejorados para clientes empresariales. El proyecto busca ofrecer las capacidades de agentes autónomos con menos riesgos que las versiones open-source.
bajada_en: Microsoft is developing its own OpenClaw-like AI agent with improved security controls for enterprise customers. The project aims to offer autonomous agent capabilities with fewer risks than open-source versions.

title: Microsoft is testing OpenClaw-like AI bots for Copilot
summary: Microsoft is looking into ways it can integrate OpenClaw-style features into its Copilot AI assistant, according to a report from The Information. The test reportedly comes as part of efforts to make Microsoft 365 Copilot "run autonomously around the clock" while completing tasks on behalf of users. Omar Shahine, Microsoft's corporate vice president, confirmed to […]
title_es: Microsoft prueba agentes IA en Copilot para automatización 24/7
bajada: Microsoft está integrando características similares a OpenClaw en Copilot para permitir que Microsoft 365 Copilot ejecute tareas de forma autónoma alrededor del reloj. Las pruebas buscan mejorar la automatización en productos empresariales de Microsoft.
bajada_en: Microsoft is integrating OpenClaw-like features into Copilot to enable Microsoft 365 Copilot to run autonomously around the clock. Tests aim to enhance automation in Microsoft's enterprise products.

title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch signals IPO readiness as AI agents fuel revenue surge
summary: While many startups founded prior to the emergence of ChatGPT are struggling to position themselves for the AI era, Vercel, a 10-year-old dev tool and website hosting platform, is benefiting from the explosion of AI-generated apps and agents.
title_es: Vercel se prepara para IPO impulsada por boom de agentes IA
bajada: Vercel, plataforma de dev tools y hosting, está señalando preparación para IPO gracias al crecimiento de ingresos desde el auge de apps y agentes generados por IA. La empresa demuestra que herramientas developer se benefician de la expansión de IA.
bajada_en: Vercel, a dev tools and hosting platform, is signaling IPO readiness thanks to revenue growth from the AI-generated apps and agents boom. The company demonstrates that developer tools are benefiting from AI expansion.

title: The AI revolution in math has arrived
title_es: La revolución de IA en matemáticas ya llegó
bajada: Reportaje de Quanta Magazine documenta cómo sistemas IA están transformando la investigación matemática con resultados significativos. El fenómeno marca un punto de inflexión en cómo la IA contribuye a descubrimientos científicos avanzados.
bajada_en: Quanta Magazine reports how AI systems are transforming mathematical research with significant results. The phenomenon marks a turning point in how AI contributes to advanced scientific discoveries.

title: Read OpenAI’s latest internal memo about beating the competition — including Anthropic
summary: OpenAI's chief revenue officer, Denise Dresser, sent a four-page memo to employees on Sunday about the company's strategic direction, emphasizing the need to lock in users and grow its enterprise business. The memo, which was viewed by The Verge, repeatedly underlines the importance of building a moat around its AI products, to combat how easy […]
title_es: Memo interno de OpenAI revela estrategia competitiva contra Anthropic
bajada: Un memo de la directora de ingresos de OpenAI señala la necesidad de consolidar usuarios y crecer el negocio empresarial para competir contra Anthropic y otros rivales. El documento enfatiza construir un moat alrededor de sus productos de IA.
bajada_en: A memo from OpenAI's chief revenue officer outlines the need to lock in users and grow the enterprise business to compete against Anthropic and rivals. The document emphasizes building competitive moats around its AI products.

title: LABBench2: An Improved Benchmark for AI Systems Performing Biology Research
summary:
arXiv:2604.09554v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Optimism for accelerating scientific discovery with AI continues to grow. Current applications of AI in scientific research range from training dedicated foundation models on scientific data to agentic autonomous hypothesis generation systems to AI-driven autonomous labs. The need to measure progress of AI systems in scientific domains correspondingly must not only accelerate, but increasingly shift focus to more real-world capabilities. Beyond rote knowledge and even just reasoning to actually measuring the ability to perform meaningful work. Prior work introduced the Language Agent Biology Benchmark LAB-Bench as an initial attempt at measuring these abilities. Here we introduce an evolution of that benchmark, LABBench2, for measuring real-world capabilities of AI systems performing useful scientific tasks. LABBench2 comprises nearly 1,900 tasks and is, for the most part, a continuation of LAB-Bench, measuring similar capabilities but in more realistic contexts. We evaluate performance of current frontier models, and show that while abilities measured by LAB-Bench and LABBench2 have improved substantially, LABBench2 provides a meaningful jump in difficulty (model-specific accuracy differences range from -26% to -46% across subtasks) and underscores continued room for performance improvement. LABBench2 continues the legacy of LAB-Bench as a de facto benchmark for AI scientific research capabilities and we hope that it continues to help advance development of AI tools for these core research functions. To facilitate community use and development, we provide the task dataset at https://huggingface.co/datasets/futurehouse/labbench2 and a public eval harness at https://github.com/EdisonScientific/labbench2.
title_es: LABBench2: Nuevo benchmark para IA en investigación biológica
bajada: Investigadores presentaron LABBench2, una evolución del benchmark anterior con ~1,900 tareas para medir capacidades reales de sistemas IA en investigación científica. El benchmark enfatiza medir trabajo significativo más allá del conocimiento memorizado.
bajada_en: Researchers introduced LABBench2, an evolution of the previous benchmark with ~1,900 tasks measuring real-world capabilities of AI systems in scientific research. The benchmark emphasizes measuring meaningful work beyond memorized knowledge.

title: Turing Test on Screen: A Benchmark for Mobile GUI Agent Humanization
summary:
arXiv:2604.09574v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: The rise of autonomous GUI agents has triggered adversarial countermeasures from digital platforms, yet existing research prioritizes utility and robustness over the critical dimension of anti-detection. We argue that for agents to survive in human-centric ecosystems, they must evolve Humanization capabilities. We introduce the ``Turing Test on Screen,'' formally modeling the interaction as a MinMax optimization problem between a detector and an agent aiming to minimize behavioral divergence. We then collect a new high-fidelity dataset of mobile touch dynamics, and conduct our analysis that vanilla LMM-based agents are easily detectable due to unnatural kinematics. Consequently, we establish the Agent Humanization Benchmark (AHB) and detection metrics to quantify the trade-off between imitability and utility. Finally, we propose methods ranging from heuristic noise to data-driven behavioral matching, demonstrating that agents can achieve high imitability theoretically and empirically without sacrificing performance. This work shifts the paradigm from whether an agent can perform a task to how it performs it within a human-centric ecosystem, laying the groundwork for seamless coexistence in adversarial digital environments.
title_es: Turing Test en pantalla: Benchmark para humanización de agentes móviles
bajada: Investigadores introdujeron el Agent Humanization Benchmark (AHB) para medir si agentes IA pueden pasar pruebas de detección en interfaces móviles sin parecer robóticas. El trabajo aborda cómo hacer agentes IA indistinguibles de comportamiento humano.
bajada_en: Researchers introduced the Agent Humanization Benchmark (AHB) to measure whether AI agents can pass detection tests on mobile interfaces without appearing robotic. The work addresses making AI agents indistinguishable from human behavior.

title: An AI Vibe Coding Horror Story
title_es: Historia de horror: Los riesgos reales de confiar en IA para codificar
bajada: Un developer documentó problemas críticos encontrados al usar IA para escribir código sin suficiente revisión, incluyendo seguridad y calidad comprometidas. El artículo subraya la importancia de verificación humana en workflows de desarrollo asistidos por IA.
bajada_en: A developer documented critical issues found when using AI for coding without sufficient review, including compromised security and quality. The article underscores the importance of human verification in AI-assisted development workflows.

title: Silicon Valley Is Spending Millions to Stop One of Its Own
summary: Alex Bores, a former Palantir employee, helped pass one of the country’s toughest AI laws. Now Silicon Valley’s biggest names are trying to stop his rise to Congress.
title_es: Silicon Valley invierte millones para frenar a ex-Palantir en Congreso
bajada: Alex Bores, ex-empleado de Palantir, ayudó a aprobar una de las leyes de IA más estrictas del país y ahora enfrenta oposición de grandes nombres de tech en su candidatura al Congreso. El conflicto refleja tensiones entre regulación y intereses de la industria.
bajada_en: Alex Bores, a former Palantir employee, helped pass one of the country's toughest AI laws and now faces opposition from tech leaders in his congressional bid. The conflict reflects tensions between regulation and industry interests.

title: Stanford report highlights growing disconnect between AI insiders and everyone else
summary: Stanford’s latest AI Index shows a widening gap between experts and the public, with rising anxiety over jobs, healthcare, and the economy.
title_es: Stanford: Creciente brecha entre expertos de IA y público general
bajada: El AI Index de Stanford revela una desconexión cada vez mayor entre expertos de IA y el público, con ansiedad creciente sobre empleo, salud y economía. El reporte subraya la necesidad de mejor comunicación sobre los impactos reales de IA.
bajada_en: Stanford's AI Index reveals a widening gap between AI experts and the public, with rising anxiety about jobs, healthcare, and the economy. The report underscores the need for better communication about AI's real impacts.

title: The tech jobs bust is real. Don't blame AI (yet)
title_es: Crisis de empleos tech es real, pero AI aún no es la culpa principal
bajada: The Economist analiza que la caída de empleos en tech es real pero atribuye sus causas principalmente a factores económicos previos, no a IA. El análisis proporciona contexto importante mientras la industria debate el impacto laboral de IA.
bajada_en: The Economist analyzes that the tech jobs bust is real but attributes its causes mainly to prior economic factors, not AI. The analysis provides important context as the industry debates AI's labor impact.

title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
summary: Woman working with a large tool. On the left are the Google and MIT FutureTech logos, "AI for the Economy Forum", and "Innovation and Adaption in the New Era"
title_es: Google y MIT organizan foro sobre IA en la economía
bajada: Google convocó el AI for the Economy Forum junto a MIT para explorar innovación y adaptación en la nueva era de IA. El evento reúne a líderes para discutir el impacto económico y oportunidades de la IA.
bajada_en: Google convened the AI for the Economy Forum with MIT to explore innovation and adaptation in the new AI era. The event brings together leaders to discuss AI's economic impact and opportunities.
